x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Arb.NET Tool — utilities for working with .arb localization files.

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate .resx files in a solution to .arb format.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: List the files that would be written without actually writing them. [default: False]

options.name: --arb-dir
options.description: Relative path for the arb directory inside the output folder (default: "arbs").

options.name: --output-class
options.description: Base name for generated locale classes and the dispatcher.

options.name: --deduplicate
options.description: Merge colliding keys that have identical values across all locales into a single key. Keys with any differing value are still suffixed with their source file name. [default: False]

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Path to the folder containing .resx files to migrate.

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: Path to the output project folder (will contain l10n.yaml and arb directory).

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate .g.cs files from .arb files and l10n.yaml.

arguments.name: project-dir
arguments.description: Directory containing l10n.yaml (walks up if omitted or not found there).
